title: 10 best herbal tinctures for dry scalp
description: Aloe tinctures helps with dry scalp because of its soothing and moisturizing properties. The aloe vera gel extracted from the plant contains vitamins, minerals, and amino acids that deeply nourish the scalp, calming irritation and flakiness. As it penetrates the skin, it hydrates the scalp, reducing dryness and itchiness, while also promoting healthy hair growth. By using an herbal aloe tincture on a regular basis, individuals with dry scalp can achieve a healthier, more balanced scalp...
